title: Notifications - Low battery after unplugging the power cable
scenario: Low battery notification transitions to charging notification when device is plugged in, and reverts to low battery notification when unplugged
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
Ensure a Poly Bluetooth audio device is connected and its battery level is below 5%.
Plug the power cable into the Poly Bluetooth audio device to start charging.
Observe the notification area on the Android device.
Verify that the Poly Studio Mobile app displays a charging notification.
Unplug the power cable from the Poly Bluetooth audio device.
Observe the notification area on the Android device again.
Verify that the charging notification changes to a low battery notification.
expected: When the device is plugged in and charging, the app shows a charging notification. After unplugging, the notification changes to a low battery notification.
